entities.name: WOMEN
entities.description: Key actors in food systems as farmers, processors, wageworkers, traders, and consumers, often structurally disadvantaged and undervalued

entities.name: MEN
entities.description: Key actors in food systems as farmers, processors, wageworkers, traders, and consumers

entities.name: FOOD SYSTEMS
entities.description: The complex network of actors and activities involved in the production, processing, distribution, and consumption of food

entities.name: GENDER DYNAMICS
entities.description: The interactions and power relations between men and women within food systems

entities.name: GENDER INEQUALITIES
entities.description: Structural disadvantages and undervalued contributions of women within the food system

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE FOOD SYSTEMS
entities.description: Food systems that are efficient, inclusive, resilient, and capable of providing healthy diets

entities.name: GENDER EQUITY
entities.description: Fairness and justice in the distribution of benefits and opportunities between men and women in food systems

entities.name: WOMEN'S EMPOWERMENT
entities.description: The process of increasing the capacity of women to make strategic life choices and participate in food systems

entities.name: GENDER-SENSITIVE POLICIES
entities.description: Policies and programs designed to address gender differences and promote equity in food systems

entities.name: HLPE FOOD SYSTEMS FRAMEWORK
entities.description: A framework developed by the High-Level Panel of Experts used to examine gender dynamics in food systems

entities.name: HEALTHY DIETS
entities.description: Nutritionally balanced diets necessary for human health, targeted for achievement in low and middle-income countries

entities.name: LOW AND MIDDLE-INCOME COUNTRIES
entities.description: The geographic focus for attaining sustainable food systems and healthy diets
